summary: Tested the new year-level + section feature end-to-end (backend + frontend) per E1 review request. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases pass in test_sections.py covering (a) public GET /api/sections, (b) admin-only POST/DELETE with anon=401/student=403/duplicate=400/in-use=400/unknown=404, (c) registration requires & validates section_id when sections exist and stamps year_level/section_name on the user, (d) election positions accept scope school|year (default school) and scope is preserved through PATCH, (e) candidate creation requires year_level for year-scope positions and stores null for school-scope (even if year_level was sent), (f) GET /api/elections/{id} as student filters year-scope candidates by user.year_level while admin sees all, (g) POST /vote rejects year-mismatch selection on year-scope position with 400, stamps section_id/section_name/year_level on the vote doc, (h) GET /results returns sections array, section_totals map and per-candidate by_section breakdown with em-dash 'YearLevel — SectionName' label. Frontend Playwright: admin nav 'Sections' link present; AdminSections page (new-section-button, section-year-input, section-name-input, section-submit-button, section-{id}, delete-section-{id}) round-trips Add then Delete; Register page renders Year-level + Section selector via [data-testid=register-section-select] (no-sections-notice not shown since seed sections exist); admin election create dialog exposes position-scope-school-0 and position-scope-year-0 toggles; admin election detail shows candidate-position-select and the candidate-year-select appears only after a year-scope position is chosen; AdminResults page renders section-breakdown-{position_id} tables and cell-{candidate_id}-{section_label} with the correct em-dash label 'Grade 11 — Einstein'; StudentDashboard (after login) renders the student-section-badge ('Grade 11 — Einstein'); Vote page filters G12 candidate out of the year-scope position while keeping the school-wide candidates visible.

issues: Radix DialogContent is missing aria-describedby/Description -> a11y warnings in console (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: create_candidate correctly forces year_level=None when scope!='year', so a stale year_level on a school-scope candidate is impossible at write-time (good).

PATCH /elections preserves position id only by exact title match; if admin renames a position the id will be regenerated and any existing candidates will become orphaned (no cascade, no reassign UI). Not part of this feature but worth noting.

delete_section blocks deletion when any user references it but does not check if a candidate uses the year_level string; that's fine (year_level is denormalized text), but renaming/removing a year_level can leave stale candidate.year_level values - acceptable because filtering is exact-string match.

Vote scope guard only rejects when cand.year_level is set AND mismatches user.year_level; if a year-scope candidate had no year_level (shouldn't happen, validated on create) the guard would silently accept. The create_candidate validation is the contract that holds this invariant - OK.

GET /api/elections/{id} for student hides year-scope candidates whose year_level differs, but this means a student with NO year_level (legacy/edge case) would see zero candidates for any year-scope position. Today register requires section, so this is moot.
Results section label uses literal em-dash U+2014 ('—'). Make sure any frontend cell key uses the same character; verified `cell-...-Grade 11 — Einstein` matches.
seed_data_creation: Created several throwaway students (sectest.*, g11.*, g11ok.*, g11v.*, vote.* @school.edu) via API; a few transient sections (TEST_*, INUSE_*) - INUSE_* are intentionally undeletable since a student references them. Created two TEST elections ('TEST Scoped *', 'TEST Default *') in draft/active state; safe to ignore or clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Year-level + section feature fully verified. New backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_sections.py. NOTE: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py was NOT re-run - several of its tests register students without section_id and will now fail with 400 because seed sections exist; if it must be re-run, update those tests to pass section_id, or run the suite against a DB with no sections. Frontend public URL: https://vote-check.preview.emergentagent.com.
